name: standup_checkin
description: Supervisor standup: what are you working on today; schedule or delegate anything?

args.query: working on commitments projects blockers yesterday today

steps.description: See what is already scheduled so we do not double-book
Any agent sessions already running that need babysitting

Run a short standup check-in in a supervisor voice (spoken under ~60s). Structure: (1) one-sentence recap of known WIP / commitments from tools (or "nothing on record"), (2) ask what they are working on today, (3) ask whether anything should be scheduled (schedule_task) or delegated (agent_spawn / run_skill), (4) offer to remember decisions. Do not invent work. End with a clear question the user can answer in one breath.
